message:
fix(tools): NaN/Inf fail-open in containment_revocation_metrics latency validation

NaN latency values bypassed the negative-latency check (NaN < 0.0 is
false), allowing corrupt event data into the metrics engine. This could
corrupt percentile calculations and cause NaN convergence times to not
be flagged as SLO breaches (NaN >= slo_ms is false — fail-open).

Added !is_finite() guards before the negativity check + 4 regression
tests (NaN/Inf/NEG_INFINITY for both ack and convergence latencies).

Closes: bd-1ikg

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
